plan.title: Reconcile verify:go-freeze version source to a release-tag check

narratives.Description: The freeze gate currently compares the pinned SoT against the `var version` literal in cmd/deft-install/main.go, but the real installer version is injected via ldflags at build time, so pinning the SoT to a 0.x tag would false-fail the gate. This story moves freeze enforcement to a release.yml tag check that refuses a Go installer build above the pinned SoT and neutralizes the brittle source-literal comparison in freeze-gate.ts.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
- Change the comparison in packages/core/src/legacy-bridge/freeze-gate.ts so evaluateGoFreeze keys off the release tag input rather than the parseInstallerVersion source literal, keeping readInstallerVersion only where a release-time value is genuinely needed.
- Add a guard step to the Go build job in .github/workflows/release.yml that reads lastGoInstaller() and fails the build when github.ref_name is above the pinned SoT.
- Update packages/core/src/legacy-bridge/freeze-gate.test.ts to assert the tag-based comparison passes a 0.x tag at or below the pin and rejects a tag above it.
narratives.UserStory: As a Deft release maintainer, I want the freeze gate to compare the release tag against the pinned installer SoT, so that pinning a 0.x freeze tag does not false-fail the gate against a stale source literal.
narratives.Traces: Issue #1972 step 1a; #1912 freeze gate; #1969 SoT + verify:go-freeze

items.title: Given the SoT is pinned to a 0.x tag, when verify:go-freeze evaluates an equal-or-lower release tag, then the gate returns exit code 0.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the SoT is pinned to a 0.x tag, when verify:go-freeze evaluates an equal-or-lower release tag, then the gate returns exit code 0.

items.title: Given the SoT is pinned, when a release tag above the pinned tag is evaluated, then the gate fails and emits the above-the-line violation message.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the SoT is pinned, when a release tag above the pinned tag is evaluated, then the gate fails and emits the above-the-line violation message.

items.title: Given the SoT is null, when verify:go-freeze runs, then the gate returns an advisory pass and does not read the installer source literal.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the SoT is null, when verify:go-freeze runs, then the gate returns an advisory pass and does not read the installer source literal.

expected_outputs: freeze-gate.ts keyed off the release tag instead of the source literal
release.yml refuses a Go build above the pinned SoT
freeze-gate.test.ts covers at/below/above the pinned tag

references.title: Issue #1972: Wave 5 finalization: freeze the Go bridge, retire Go, purge Python (runbook + recovery)
